resources:
Eazy Payments Back
WELCOME
Safe and fast transaction Single use password that won’t work twice, keeping your details safe even if they get exposed Analysis of data Improving customer retention through data analytics, there are several takeaways to keep in mind Quick and easy payments Creating a seamless payment experience is crucial for user satisfaction and conversio Get Started Skip
Activate Now Please Enter TID and MID to Activate Device Please Enter TID Please Enter MID TID and MID should not be empty TID length should be 8 MID length should be 15 Activation Failed
Add User Please enter username and password User Type: Admin Clerk Add User Done User Added User Addition Failed User Exists Username should not be empty Password length should be 6 Password does not match
Please login to continue Please Enter Your New Password Login Logout Change Password Forgot Password? Username Password Confirm Password Please Enter Username Please Enter Password Please Confirm Password Please Enter New Password Username and password should not be empty Invalid credentials
Current New Confirm Enter Current Password Enter New Password Please enter your current password Password was changed Password change failed Invalid current password
Refund Net Total Enter the Refund Amount Enter the Invoice Number Enter the Email Id Invoice Number Enter the Authorisation Amount Enter the Auth Captured Amount Void Purchase Enter the Transaction Amount Purchase Pre-Auth Void Please Enter The Pin Pin Original Amount Card: Auth Code: Auth Code: No.: No Invoice Number: POS Entry: POS Entry: PRINT CANCEL CANCEL Tap/Swipe/Insert Chip Detected Confirm Cancel Cancel ? YES Add Tip: Select an application id Transaction Summary: Total Amount: Refund Amount: Custom End your shift? Are you sure you want to end your shift? Are you sure want to Cancel ? Print Shift Report Print Last Receipt Decline DECLINE Done Open Training Printing Merchant Receipt E-RECEIPT Customer Receipt Enter the Tip Amount Amount Adjust Enter the Percentage Percentage Eazy Payments Please Wait Enter Your Password Set Language Select Your Language हिन्दी HOME English Scan QR/Barcode Forget Password ? Call Customer Care for Password MID: TID: Sr.No Call Center: Email Sucess Email Sent E-Receipt was successfully sent OK 10% SGST CGST Enter Tip Percentage for Button Current Tip Enter SGST Percentage Enter CGST Percentage Current Tax 15% 20% ---------------or--------------- Close Chip Detected APPROVED Original Amount : Txn Date: Select the Pre-Auth Type New-Authorisation Auth-Capture Transaction Amount: Tip Amount: SGST Amount: CGST Amount: IGST Amount:
Headers Footers

Configuration User Management Training Mode Auto Print Report on Sign Out Prompt Invoice Number Auto Print Merchant Receipt Enable Tipping Taxes Inactivity Timeout Timeout (sec) Timeout Receipt Details SAVE --------Adjust %-------- Set Timeout

Transactions
Select DateFilter by Batch Number Filter by Batch Number Transaction List is Empty Select the Batch Id To Close Batch Confirmation Are You Sure ? You want to close the Batch Print ? Which Report You want Summary Detail
Payment Successful
Printing Error Printer is Out Paper Printer is Busy Printing No Record Found
GLOBAL PAYMENTS STORE ADDRESS: MID: TID: --------------------------------- CARD TYPE: CARD No: TRANS TYPE: BATCH NO: TRACE NO: DATE TIME REF NO: APP CODE: Txn ID: APP: AMT: SALES TAX: POS TERMINAL: Card Entry Mode: AID: TC: TOTAL: TRANSACTION STATUS: PAYMENT:: AUTHORIZATION: INV: AUTH Code TIP SIGN
SUMMARY REPORT --------------- Purchase Refund Void Tip Surcharges CashBack Total Transaction Breakdown: Credit Transactions: Debit Transactions: SUMMARY
Detail Transaction Summary Transaction Count Transactions Details TxnType Status Invoice No Txn_Amount TotalAmount AuthCode
Recent Activity See All
Initialization Payment SDK Initialized !! Payment SDK Initialization Failed !! Processing
Chip Card Processing\nDo not remove Card Swiped Card Tapped No Card Detected Not an IC Card Card Read Error, Swipe Again Swipe Your Card Card Read Timeout Card Read Cancelled Device Busy Card Read OK Please Remove Your Card Use Contact Chip Card Use MagStripe Insert Swipe or Try Another Card See Your Phone and Present Card Again Need Signature End Application Tap You Card Again Application Blocked Card Blocked Terminated
Card Read Error Processing Error Callback Error ICS Param Missing EMV Kernel Error PIN Length Error Multiple Cards Presented Card Read Error AID Param Missing CAP Key Param Missing Kernel Data Error QPBOC App Error QPBOC FDDA Failed PURE Cash Card Not Allowed for Online Transactions
Enter Header 1 Enter Header 2 Enter Header 3 Enter Header 4 Enter Footer 1 Enter Footer 2 Enter Footer 3 Enter Footer 4 Enter Text
Select the User
APPROVED CALL ISSUER - Refer to card issuer CALL ISSUER - Refer to card issuer, special condition INVALID MERCHANT - CONTACT LYRA # 03 DECLINED PICK UP CARD - Capture card DO NOT HONOR TRANS DECLINED ERROR/MERCHANT ERROR - CONTACT LYRA # 06 PICK UP # 07 - Pickup card, special condition (other than lost/stolen card) APPROVED VERIFY ID and SIGNATURE - Honor with ID APPROVED IN PART - Partial Approval INVALID TXN - Invalid transaction INVALID AMOUNT - Invalid amount DECLINED # 14 - Invalid card number DECLINED # 15 - Invalid issuer DECLINED # 17 - Customer cancellation DECLINED # 19 - Re-enter transaction INVALID RESPONSE - Invalid response RETRY # 21 - No action taken RETRY # 22 - Suspected malfunction RETRY # 25 - Unable to locate record RETRY # 27 - File Update field edit error RETRY # 28 - Record already exists in the file RETRY # 29 - File Update not successful FORMAT ERROR - PACKET / FORMAT ERROR (Mandatory fields absent or invalid characters) RETRY # 31 - Bank not supported by switch RETRY # 32 - Partial Reversal EXPIRED CARD # 33 - Expired card, capture DECLINED # 34 - Suspected fraud, capture RESTRICTED CARD - Restricted card, capture EXCESS PIN TRIES - Allowable PIN tries exceeded, capture DECLINED # 39 - No credit account DECLINED # 40 - Requested function not supported PICK UP # 41 - Lost card, capture DECLINED # 42 - No universal account PICK UP # 43 - Stolen card, capture DECLINED # 51 - Insufficient funds/over credit limit NO CHK ACCT - No checking account NO SAVINGS ACCT - No savings account EXPIRED CARD - Expired card (if Expiry Date check is enabled for BIN range) INCORRECT PIN - Invalid PIN DECLINED # 57 - Transaction not permitted to Cardholder DECLINED # 58 - Transaction not permitted to terminal DECLINED # 59 - Suspected fraud DECLINED # 60 - Card acceptor contact acquirer, decline EXCEEDS AMT LMT - Exceeds withdrawal amount limit RESTRICTED CARD - Restricted card SECURITY ERR # 63 - Security violation RETRY # 64 - Transaction does not fulfill AML requirement (Stand-In Processing) EXCEEDS COUNT - Exceeds withdrawal frequency limit DECLINE # 66 - Card acceptor calls acquirer PICK UP # 67 - Hard capture (requires card pickup at ATM) RETRY # 68 - Acquirer time-out RETRY # 69 - Mobile number record not found/mis-match RETRY # 70 - Contact Card Issuer RETRY # 71 - Deemed Acceptance / PIN Not Changed RETRY # 74 - Transactions declined by Issuer based on Risk Score EX-PIN TRIES # 75 - Allowable number of PIN tries exceeded PVT ERROR # 76 - MC: Invalid/nonexistent "To Account"; VISA: No match on Retrieval Reference number PVT ERROR # 77 - MC: Invalid/nonexistent "From Account"; VISA: Inconsistent repeat/reversal data PVT ERROR # 78 - MC: Invalid/nonexistent account; VISA: "Blocked, first used" TRANSACTION REVERSED - Transaction already reversed BAD BATCH NO # 80 - Duplicate Batch PVT ERROR # 81 - MC: Domestic Debit not allowed; VISA: PIN cryptographic error (Stand-In Processing) TIMEOUT AT ISSUER - Timeout at issuer HSM KEY ERROR - Key Error. Initiate Key Injection DECLINED # 84 - Invalid Authorization Life Cycle PVT ERROR # 85 - Not declined, valid for all zero amount transactions PVT ERROR # 86 - PIN Validation not possible PVT ERROR # 87 - Purchase Amount Only, No Cash Back Allowed CRYPTOGRAPHIC FAILURE - Cryptographic failure PVT ERROR # 89 - Unacceptable PIN - Transaction Declined Retry CUT OFF IN PROCESS - Cut-off is in process TRY AFTER 5MIN # 91 - Authorization System or issuer system inoperative TRY AFTER 5MIN # 92 - Unable to route transaction DECLINED # 93 - Transaction cannot be completed; violation of law PVT ERROR # 94 - Duplicate transmission TOTALS MISMATCH - Totals Mismatch (Only for Settlements); Reconcile error SYSTEM ERROR - System malfunction CVV2 FAILURE - Decline for CVV2 failure OFFLINE APPROVED 1 - EMV transaction offline approved by terminal OFFLINE APPROVED 3 - EMV transaction unable to go online; offline approved by terminal OFFLINE DECLINED 1 - EMV transaction offline declined at terminal OFFLINE DECLINED 3 - EMV transaction unable to go online; offline declined at terminal AAC GENERATED BY CHIP - AAC generated by Chip card REVERSAL RESPONSE CODE - Terminal does not receive final application cryptogram from the chip UNKNOWN ERROR
